title: Verify PdfPig Native-AOT extraction conformance
steps: Publish the linux-x64 self-contained Native-AOT Tally binary with PdfPig pinned; inject each qualified private fixture through the test-only fixture provider; preview every fixture twice while measuring wall time and peak RSS; compare page/glyph evidence digests; include the permission-encrypted fixture.
expected: Every fixture yields non-empty deterministic evidence twice; the encrypted fixture needs no opening password; each run is under 5 seconds and 256 MiB; no trim/AOT failure, source argument, external process, or fixture disclosure occurs.
